basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Banaras Hindu University) Varanasi
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Banaras Hindu University) Varanasi has released the official Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. IIT(BHU)/CER/PS/01/2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 28 years with an M.Sc. or M.Tech degree in Materials Science, Ceramic Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Physics, Chemistry, or related disciplines with First Class or equivalent CGPA can apply for this contractual position. Candidates possessing GATE or CSIR-UGC NET qualification will be given preference. Interested applicants can submit their offline application form on or before

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years. Age relaxation as per GoI rules for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped/Female candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M.Tech in Materials Science/Ceramic Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Physics/Chemistry (First class or equivalent CGPA), GATE or CSIR-UGC NET (desirable)
qualification.details: First class or equivalent CGPA in M.Sc./M.Tech in Materials Science/Ceramic Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Physics/Chemistry. Desirable: GATE or CSIR-UGC NET with good score.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU JRF Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU JRF Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT BHU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT BHU JRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU JRF Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: First class or equivalent CGPA in M.Sc./M.Tech in Materials Science/Ceramic Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Physics/Chemistry. Desirable: GATE or CSIR-UGC NET with good score.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU JRF Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 28 years. Age relaxation as per GoI rules for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped/Female candidates.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application (21 days from advertisement)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT BHU JRF Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU JRF Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the IIT BHU JRF recruitment is 09-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a First class or equivalent CGPA in M.Sc./M.Tech in Materials Science/Ceramic Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Physics/Chemistry. GATE or CSIR-UGC NET with a good score is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the JRF position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/Physically Handicapped/Female candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a stipend of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT BHU JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JRF post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IIT(BHU)/CER/PS/01/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Which department or institute is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology (Banaras Hindu University) Varanasi (IIT BHU).

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this JRF position?
faq.answer: The job type for this JRF position is Contractual.
